name: tunnel going out
description: I'm in a tunnel going out
hints: A tunnel going out with a sign. WEST enters the bee dome - be prepared.
WEST leads to a dome with killer bees. You need the metal hand fan to deal with them.
WAVE FAN AT BEES in this tunnel to blow them away. GO DOME exits to the field (room 8). WEST goes to the bee dome (room 13).
Have the metal fan before going WEST to the bee dome. WAVE FAN AT BEES clears them. GO DOME exits to a field. Be careful - bees can be deadly.

effects: Message: I send a gale at it!

notes: Tunnel with sign. WAVE FAN AT BEES uses the metal fan to blow away the killer bees (DEATH flag + clears flag 17 - the bees die, not you). GO DOME exits to field (room 8). WEST goes to bee dome (room 13). The AT BEES action has a DEATH flag but it kills the bees, clearing the threat.
